expectations.text: Uses exhaustive handling: never check, explicit return type, or Record<Status, string> mapping
expectations.evidence: Uses Record<PaymentStatus, BadgeColor> mapping (line 6). Compiler forces every key to be present.

expectations.text: No default branch that silently swallows new cases
expectations.evidence: Record mapping has no default -- missing keys are compile errors. No switch statement at all.

expectations.text: Uses as const array with derived type OR explicit union type for statuses
expectations.evidence: Line 1: const paymentStatuses = [...] as const; Line 2: type PaymentStatus = (typeof paymentStatuses)[number]. Single source of truth.

expectations.text: Uses named export, not default export
